election.note_bm: Tarikh belum diumumkan — penggal DUN berakhir Dis 2026, pilihan raya perlu diadakan menjelang akhir Feb 2027.
election.note_en: Date not yet announced — the assembly's term ends Dec 2026, so polls are due by late Feb 2027.

last_result.winner: Mohd Noor Helmy bin Abdul Halem

national_issues.issue_bm: Subsidi petrol kini bersasar: RM1.99 seliter dengan MyKad sejak 30 September 2025 — tetapi kuota bulanan dipotong daripada 300 kepada 200 liter pada 1 April 2026, dan harga pasaran RON95 tanpa subsidi mencecah RM3.37 seliter pada minggu kempen ini, sementara BUDI Diesel RM2.10 yang bermula 1 Julai berkongsi kuota 200 liter yang sama.
national_issues.issue_en: Petrol subsidy is now targeted: RM1.99 a litre with MyKad since 30 September 2025 — but the monthly quota was cut from 300 to 200 litres on 1 April 2026, the unsubsidised market price of RON95 hit RM3.37 a litre in this campaign week, and the new BUDI Diesel RM2.10 scheme that started 1 July shares the same 200-litre quota.
national_issues.receipt_bm: MOF (29 Sep 2025): BUDI95 bermula penuh 30 Sep — RM1.99 seliter melalui pengesahan MyKad, harga tanpa subsidi RM2.60 sebelum apungan mingguan. The Star (26 Mac 2026): subsidi BUDI95+BUDI Diesel ~RM4 bilion sebulan selepas minyak mentah melepasi USD100; PM umum kuota dipotong 300→200 liter mulai 1 April. MOF (22 Jun 2026): BUDI Madani Diesel RM2.10 seliter seluruh negara mulai 1 Julai 2026, kuota 200 liter dikongsi dengan BUDI95. paultan.org (30 Jun 2026): harga minggu 1-8 Julai — RON95 tanpa subsidi RM3.37, RON97 RM4.00, diesel RM3.97.
national_issues.receipt_en: MOF (29 Sep 2025): BUDI95 full rollout 30 Sep — RM1.99/litre via MyKad verification, unsubsidised price RM2.60 before moving to a weekly float. The Star (26 Mar 2026): BUDI95+BUDI Diesel subsidies hit ~RM4 billion a month after crude passed USD100; the PM announced the quota cut from 300 to 200 litres from 1 April. MOF (22 Jun 2026): BUDI Madani Diesel at RM2.10/litre nationwide from 1 July 2026, sharing the 200-litre quota with BUDI95. paultan.org (30 Jun 2026): 1-8 July week — unsubsidised RON95 RM3.37, RON97 RM4.00, diesel RM3.97.

national_issues.issue_bm: Sejak 1 Julai 2025 SST diperluas — cukai jualan 5-10% ke atas barangan bukan asas dan cukai perkhidmatan 6-8% ke atas SEWAAN, penjagaan kesihatan dan pendidikan swasta, pembinaan dan kewangan — dijangka mengutip ~RM10 bilion setahun menjelang 2026; namun pada musim panas yang SAMA, cukai Barangan Bernilai Tinggi (HVGT) yang dirancang ke atas golongan ultra-kaya dibatalkan terus (30 Julai 2025). Mereka meluaskan cukai ke atas hidup harian anda, dan membatalkan cukai ke atas orang kaya.
national_issues.issue_en: Since 1 July 2025 the SST has been expanded — 5-10% sales tax on non-essentials and 6-8% service tax on RENT, private healthcare and private education, construction and finance — expected to raise ~RM10 billion a year by 2026; yet in the SAME summer the planned High-Value Goods Tax on the ultra-rich was scrapped outright (30 July 2025). They widened the tax on your everyday life and cancelled the tax on the rich.
national_issues.receipt_bm: Malay Mail (9 Jun 2025): skop dan kadar perluasan SST mulai 1 Julai (barangan asas kekal 0%). Malay Mail (24 Jul 2025): MOF jangka tambahan RM5 bilion pada 2025 dan kira-kira dua kali ganda pada 2026. Malay Mail (30 Jul 2025): kerajaan TIDAK meneruskan HVGT (5-10% ke atas kereta >RM200k, jam tangan >RM20k, barang kemas >RM10k; ~RM700 juta hasil dilepaskan) — bersandar pada SST diperluas. Bernama (20 Jun 2025): tarif asas purata Semenanjung 45.40 sen/kWj mulai 1 Julai 2025; pengguna domestik ≤1,000kWj tidak terjejas.
national_issues.receipt_en: Malay Mail (9 Jun 2025): the SST expansion's scope and rates from 1 July (essentials stay zero-rated). Malay Mail (24 Jul 2025): MOF expects an extra RM5 billion in 2025 and roughly double in 2026. Malay Mail (30 Jul 2025): the government will NOT proceed with the HVGT (5-10% on cars >RM200k, watches >RM20k, jewellery >RM10k; ~RM700m forgone) — leaning on the expanded SST instead. Bernama (20 Jun 2025): Peninsular average base tariff 45.40 sen/kWh from 1 July 2025; domestic users ≤1,000kWh unaffected.

national_issues.issue_bm: Separuh pekerja Malaysia berpendapatan bawah ~RM2,800 sebulan (gaji penengah RM2,793, 2024) — sementara gaji penengah di Singapura kira-kira 6-7 kali ganda dalam ringgit, sebab itu 300,000+ rakyat merentas Tambak setiap hari. 1 daripada 3 graduan bekerja di bawah kelayakan (32.2%), dan bagi bawah 24 tahun ia 66%. Gaji minimum dinaikkan ke RM1,700 (Feb 2025), tetapi ia tidak menutup jurang yang membuatkan anak muda kita pergi.
national_issues.issue_en: Half of working Malaysians earn under ~RM2,800/month (median wage RM2,793, 2024) — while Singapore's median paycheck is roughly 6-7× that in ringgit, which is why 300,000+ cross the causeway daily. 1 in 3 graduates works below their qualification (32.2%); for under-24s it is 66%. The minimum wage rose to RM1,700 (Feb 2025), but it doesn't close the gap that makes our young leave.
national_issues.receipt_bm: DOSM Laporan Gaji & Upah 2024: gaji penengah bulanan RM2,793. Singapore MOM: gaji penengah kasar S$5,500 (pertengahan 2024) ≈ RM18,900 — kira-kira 6-7 kali ganda penengah Malaysia. CNBC (29 Okt 2024): 300,000+ rakyat Malaysia berulang-alik ke Singapura setiap hari, gaji lazimnya 3 kali lebih tinggi. OpenDOSM (2024): kadar kurang-guna berkaitan kemahiran graduan 32.2%; bawah-24 tahun 66%. The Star (18 Okt 2024): gaji minimum RM1,700 mulai 1 Feb 2025.
national_issues.receipt_en: DOSM Salaries & Wages Report 2024: monthly median wage RM2,793. Singapore MOM: median gross income S$5,500 (mid-2024) ≈ RM18,900 — roughly 6-7× Malaysia's median. CNBC (29 Oct 2024): 300,000+ Malaysians commute to Singapore daily for pay typically 3× higher. OpenDOSM (2024): graduate skills-related underemployment 32.2%; under-24s 66%. The Star (18 Oct 2024): minimum wage RM1,700 from 1 Feb 2025.

national_issues.issue_bm: Rumah di Malaysia tergolong 'seriously unaffordable' — harga penengah 4.72 kali pendapatan tahunan (2020); kerajaan janji sejuta rumah mampu milik menjelang 2035 dan tambah RM10 bilion jaminan pinjaman SJKP, tetapi tekanan harga dirasai SEKARANG, bukan 2035.
national_issues.issue_en: Malaysian housing is 'seriously unaffordable' — median price 4.72 times annual income (2020); the government pledges a million affordable homes by 2035 and an extra RM10 billion in SJKP loan guarantees, but the price pressure is being felt NOW, not in 2035.
national_issues.receipt_bm: DOSM/The Edge (2022): nisbah harga-pendapatan 4.72x pada 2020 — dalam kelompok 'seriously unaffordable' (4.1-5.0) kaedah Median Multiple. Malay Mail (31 Jul 2025): PM janji sejuta rumah mampu milik 2026-2035 bawah RMK-13. The Star (29 Okt 2025): tambahan RM10 bilion untuk Skim Jaminan Kredit Perumahan dalam Belanjawan 2026 (pembeli pertama tanpa slip gaji tetap, termasuk pekerja gig).
national_issues.receipt_en: DOSM/The Edge (2022): house price-to-income ratio 4.72x in 2020 — inside the 'seriously unaffordable' band (4.1-5.0) on the Median Multiple method. Malay Mail (31 Jul 2025): the PM pledged one million affordable homes 2026-2035 under the 13th Malaysia Plan. The Star (29 Oct 2025): an extra RM10 billion for the SJKP housing credit guarantee scheme in Budget 2026 (first-time buyers without fixed payslips, including gig workers).

income_benchmarks._comment: DOSM median MONTHLY household income (RM), national and by state, per Household Income Survey year — used to show each seat's median as a % of the national and state benchmark. Sourced from DOSM's Household Income Survey reports (2019 HIBAS, 2022, and 2024 released Oct 2025), corroborated via multiple independent search-result excerpts tied to the cited URLs (DOSM/news/CEIC) — direct page loads of DOSM are proxy-blocked in the build sandbox, hence CONFIRMED only where >=2 independent sources agreed, else PARTLY_CONFIRMED. Melaka carries no 2019 point here (only 2022/2024 could be sourced); Melaka seat income is a single 2020 estimate, so the app compares it to the nearest benchmark year common to national+state (2022) and labels that year. Re-verify against OpenDOSM hh_income_state before printing campaign material.

weather.title: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)

muda_voice.stance_bm: Luka Melaka ialah kerajaan yang tumbang di tengah penggal — 2020 dan sekali lagi Okt 2021 melalui peralihan sokongan ADUN. MUDA menyokong undang-undang anti-lompat parti (Perkara 49A, berkuat kuasa 2022) yang mengosongkan kerusi wakil yang melompat, dan pengasasnya Syed Saddiq sendiri mangsa 'Langkah Sheraton' 2020. Jawapan MUDA kepada ketakstabilan Melaka: wakil yang tidak boleh dibeli.
muda_voice.stance_en: Melaka's wound is governments that collapse mid-term — in 2020 and again in Oct 2021 through assemblymen switching sides. MUDA backs the anti-party-hopping law (Article 49A, in force 2022) that vacates a defector's seat, and its founder Syed Saddiq was himself a target of the 2020 'Sheraton Move'. MUDA's answer to Melaka's instability: representatives who can't be bought.

muda_voice.stance_bm: MUDA menuntut gaji minimum bermaruah — RM1,500 kolar biru dan RM2,500 kolar putih (berdasarkan anggaran gaji sara hidup Bank Negara 2019).
muda_voice.stance_en: MUDA demands a dignified minimum wage — RM1,500 blue-collar and RM2,500 white-collar (based on Bank Negara's 2019 living-wage estimates).

quotes.text: I'm proposing the government to increase the minimum wage to at least RM1,500 and for white-collar workers, the minimum should be RM2,500, according to estimates issued by Bank Negara Malaysia in 2019.
quotes.role_bm: Ahli Parlimen Muar (ketika itu Presiden MUDA)

muda_voice.stance_bm: MUDA menentang dasar yang menggusur penghuni sedia ada: Syed Saddiq melabel Akta Pembaharuan Semula Bandar sebagai 'Akta Rampas Rumah' kerana ambang persetujuan diturunkan ke 80% dan penghuni flat B40/M40 berisiko digantikan kondominium mewah (Feb 2025).
muda_voice.stance_en: MUDA fights policies that displace existing residents: Syed Saddiq branded the Urban Renewal Act a 'House Confiscation Act' over its consent threshold dropping to 80% and B40/M40 flat dwellers risking replacement by luxury condos (Feb 2025).

quotes.role_bm: Ahli Parlimen Muar (pengasas bersama MUDA), mengenai Akta Pembaharuan Semula Bandar
quotes.role_en: Muar MP (MUDA co-founder), on the Urban Renewal Act

muda_voice.stance_bm: Rekod banjir MUDA terdokumentasi: Misi #MariBantu Dis 2021 mengumpul RM2 juta+ daripada 40,000 penderma untuk mangsa banjir 8 negeri — parti Malaysia pertama menerbitkan audit pihak ketiga untuk dana kemanusiaan. Di Parlimen, Syed Saddiq memfailkan usul tergempar darurat iklim (Dis 2022).
muda_voice.stance_en: MUDA's flood record is documented: the Dec 2021 #MariBantu mission raised RM2m+ from 40,000 donors for flood victims across 8 states — the first Malaysian party to publish a third-party audit of humanitarian funds. In Parliament, Syed Saddiq filed an urgent climate-emergency motion (Dec 2022).

quotes.text: Don't wait too long if water levels start to rise. Move to safer areas as soon as possible. Your lives are more valuable than your belongings.

muda_voice.stance_bm: Syed Saddiq mengetuai kritikan terhadap pelaksanaan subsidi RON95 bersasar dalam perbahasan Belanjawan 2025 (Okt 2024): jangan umumkan pemotongan sebelum kumpulan T15 ditakrifkan, kerana rakyat sudah mendengar apa yang bakal hilang.
muda_voice.stance_en: Syed Saddiq led criticism of the targeted RON95 subsidy rollout in the 2025 Budget debate (Oct 2024): don't announce cuts before the T15 group is even defined, because people have already heard what they stand to lose.

quotes.text: This is the problem when we announce first and think later.
quotes.role_bm: Ahli Parlimen Muar (pengasas bersama MUDA), perbahasan Belanjawan 2025

muda_voice.label_bm: SST diperluas, cukai barangan mewah dibatalkan
muda_voice.label_en: SST expansion while the luxury-goods tax was scrapped
muda_voice.stance_bm: Pendirian MUDA: keadilan cukai — kerajaan memperluas SST ke atas barangan dan perkhidmatan harian rakyat, tetapi membatalkan terus Cukai Barangan Bernilai Tinggi (HVGT) ke atas golongan ultra-kaya (Julai 2025). Cukai elit dahulu sebelum membebankan rakyat.
muda_voice.stance_en: MUDA's position: tax fairness — the government expanded SST onto everyday goods and services while completely scrapping the High Value Goods Tax (HVGT) on the ultra-rich (July 2025). Tax the elites before burdening the rakyat.

quotes.text: This is yet another step that shows the hypocrisy of the Madani Government. They once said they wanted to tax the ultra-rich, but the plan to introduce a tax like HVGT has been completely abandoned.

muda_record._comment: Curated, source-cited national record for the pro-MUDA edition (EDITION=muda). Honesty guardrails: attribute the 2019 voting-age reform to Syed Saddiq as the 2019 Youth Minister, NOT 'the MUDA party' (MUDA was founded 2020). Never call the ~5.8M 'young voters'. Anti-hopping = advocacy, not authorship. Fact-check every claim against its sources[] before publishing.
muda_record.sub_bm: Rekod berpaksikan sumber terbuka. Sahkan sebelum menerbitkan bahan kempen.
muda_record.sub_en: A source-cited record. Verify before publishing campaign material.

national.claim_bm: Pengasas MUDA, Syed Saddiq, memacu Undi18 — pindaan Perlembagaan 2019 yang menurunkan umur mengundi dari 21 ke 18 tahun dan memperkenalkan pendaftaran pengundi automatik.
national.claim_en: MUDA's founder Syed Saddiq drove Undi18 — the 2019 constitutional amendment that lowered the voting age from 21 to 18 and introduced automatic voter registration.
national.receipt_bm: Dibentangkan oleh Syed Saddiq selaku Menteri Belia & Sukan; diluluskan Dewan Rakyat 211–0 pada 16 Julai 2019 (pindaan Perlembagaan sebulat suara pertama Malaysia) dan berkuat kuasa 15 Disember 2021. Ia menambah ~5.8 juta pengundi baharu berdaftar — kohort 18–20 tahun serta orang dewasa yang belum berdaftar — meningkatkan daftar pemilih dari ~14.9 juta ke ~21.1 juta (~41%). Dilakukan pada 2019 sebagai menteri persekutuan, setahun sebelum parti MUDA ditubuhkan.
national.receipt_en: Tabled by Syed Saddiq as Youth & Sports Minister; passed the Dewan Rakyat 211–0 on 16 July 2019 (Malaysia's first unanimous constitutional amendment) and took effect 15 December 2021. It added ~5.8 million newly-registered voters — the 18–20 cohort plus previously-unregistered adults — growing the roll from ~14.9M to ~21.1M (~41%). Done in 2019 as a federal minister, a year before the MUDA party was founded.

national.claim_bm: MUDA dan Syed Saddiq antara penyokong undang-undang anti-lompat parti (Perkara 49A) yang diluluskan pada 2022.
national.claim_en: MUDA and Syed Saddiq were among the advocates for the anti-party-hopping law (Article 49A) passed in 2022.
national.receipt_bm: Rang undang-undang kerajaan merentas parti (bukan digubal MUDA), diluluskan Dewan Rakyat 209–0 pada 28 Julai 2022 dan berkuat kuasa 5 Oktober 2022. Ia mengosongkan kerusi Ahli Parlimen yang melompat dari parti yang membawanya menang. Syed Saddiq sendiri mangsa lompat parti 'Langkah Sheraton' 2020.
national.receipt_en: A cross-party government bill (not MUDA-authored), passed the Dewan Rakyat 209–0 on 28 July 2022 and in force from 5 October 2022. It vacates an MP's seat if they defect from the party they were elected under. Syed Saddiq was himself a target of the 2020 'Sheraton Move' defections.

national.claim_bm: Parti yang ditubuhkan pada 2020 sudah memenangi kerusi di peringkat persekutuan dan negeri.
national.claim_en: A party founded in 2020 already holds elected seats at both federal and state level.
national.receipt_bm: MUDA memenangi kerusi Parlimen Muar (Syed Saddiq, dikekalkan pada PRU15 November 2022) dan kerusi DUN Puteri Wangsa (Amira Aisya, Mac 2022, ~43% dalam pertandingan enam penjuru — wakil rakyat pertama MUDA). Kedua-dua kubu di Johor. Nota: Amira Aisya mengumumkan pada 20 Jun 2026 dia tidak akan mempertahankan Puteri Wangsa.
national.receipt_en: MUDA won the Muar federal seat (Syed Saddiq, retained at GE15 in Nov 2022) and the Puteri Wangsa Johor state seat (Amira Aisya, Mar 2022, ~43% in a six-cornered fight — MUDA's first-ever elected representative). Both footholds are in Johor. Note: Amira Aisya announced on 20 June 2026 she will not defend Puteri Wangsa.

national.claim_bm: MUDA terpaksa memenangi kes Mahkamah Tinggi sekadar untuk wujud sebagai parti.
national.claim_en: MUDA had to win a High Court case just to exist as a party.
national.receipt_bm: Pendaftar Pertubuhan menolak pendaftaran MUDA (Jan 2021) tanpa sebab dinyatakan; Mahkamah Tinggi memerintahkan kerajaan mendaftarkannya dalam 14 hari, dan MUDA didaftarkan secara rasmi pada 23 Disember 2021.
national.receipt_en: The Registrar of Societies rejected MUDA's registration (Jan 2021) without stated reasons; the High Court ordered the government to register it within 14 days, and MUDA was officially registered on 23 December 2021.

national.claim_bm: Dinafikan peruntukan kawasan persekutuan biasa, Syed Saddiq membiayai kerja Muar dengan cara lain.
national.claim_en: Denied the standard federal constituency allocation, Syed Saddiq funded Muar work another way.
national.receipt_bm: Sebagai Ahli Parlimen pembangkang beliau dinafikan peruntukan pembangunan kawasan biasa; selepas 500+ hari beliau diberikan RM200,000 (bersyarat, Julai 2025), dan secara berasingan mengumpul kira-kira RM1 juta derma persendirian untuk penduduk Muar.
national.receipt_en: As an opposition MP he was denied the usual constituency development allocation; after 500+ days he was granted RM200,000 (with conditions, July 2025), and separately raised roughly RM1 million in private donations for Muar constituents.
